response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web, TypeScript, and DLang credentials, but the resume shows only a brief C++ stint (roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project), far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was retail-investment fintech, not capital markets. The core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and testing tooling authorship
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~6 months in 2014–2015), versus a mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Solid general engineering fundamentals and CI/CD
